title: Deadline mode with multiple dates/status
excerpt:

posts.author: Jorge (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a project that has multiple deadlines, structured in phases. So when it enters “phase 1” there’s a new deadline, etc.

I have one status column that reflects the different phases of the project, and several date columns that I fill with each deadline as appropriate. But it turns out I can only use the deadline mode with one date column.

Ideally monday would let me choose a particular status to check the deadline off, but I don’t see that happening in the near future.

If I mark several colors as “complete” then they affect all the columns in deadline mode.

Is there any workaround for this?

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml: Maybe you could use subitems with phases and the item as overall project.
